### Quality Checklist

- [ ] Relevant issue/task is linked.
- [ ] Backward compatibility impact is checked.
- [ ] API/behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when needed.
- [ ] Data-impacting changes were reviewed.
